parameters.responseBody:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
  <title>NOVA | Sesión Estratégica</title>
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#000000">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="https://i.ibb.co/8DVc28FY/logo.png">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@100;200;300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
    :root{
      --bg:#000;--bg2:#060606;--bg3:#0c0c0c;--bg4:#141414;--bg5:#1c1c1c;
      --t1:#fff;--t2:rgba(255,255,255,.7);--t3:rgba(255,255,255,.4);
      --t4:rgba(255,255,255,.18);--t5:rgba(255,255,255,.07);
      --glass:rgba(255,255,255,.025);--glass2:rgba(255,255,255,.045);--glass3:rgba(255,255,255,.065);
      --b1:rgba(255,255,255,.055);--b2:rgba(255,255,255,.09);--b3:rgba(255,255,255,.14);
      --sans:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;
      --ease:cubic-bezier(.25,.1,.25,1);--easeOut:cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);--easeIn:cubic-bezier(.5,0,.75,0)
    }
    html{font-size:16px;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    body{font-family:var(--sans);background:var(--bg);color:var(--t1);min-height:100vh;min-height:100dvh;
      overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-weight:300}
    ::selection{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);color:#fff}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:0;display:none}

    /* ══ AMBIENT BACKGROUND ══ */
    .ambient{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}
    .ambient-gradient{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;transition:opacity 2s ease;
      background:radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 100% at 50% 100%,rgba(30,25,50,.3) 0%,transparent 60%)}
    .ambient-gradient.on{opacity:1}
    .ambient canvas{position:absolute;inset:0}
    .vignette{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;
      background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 50% 50%,transparent 0%,rgba(0,0,0,.6) 100%)}

    /* ══ INTRO ══ */
    .intro{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
      align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#000;
      opacity:1;transition:opacity 1.2s var(--ease),transform 1.2s var(--easeIn)}
    .intro.exit{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-60px)}
    .intro.hidden{display:none}
    
    .intro-content{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
      transform:translateY(30px);opacity:0}
    .intro-content.show{animation:contentReveal 1.8s var(--easeOut) forwards}
    @keyframes contentReveal{to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}}
    
    .intro-logo{width:clamp(65px,16vw,95px);height:auto;margin-bottom:clamp(28px,5vh,45px);
      opacity:0;transform:scale(.85);filter:blur(10px)}
    .intro-logo.show{animation:logoReveal 2s var(--easeOut) forwards}
    @keyframes logoReveal{
      0%{opacity:0;transform:scale(.85);filter:blur(10px)}
      100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);filter:blur(0) drop-shadow(0 0 50px rgba(255,255,255,.15))}}
    
    .intro-text{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:clamp(8px,2.5vw,16px);
      margin-bottom:clamp(22px,4vh,36px)}
    .intro-letter{font-size:clamp(44px,13vw,88px);font-weight:100;letter-spacing:.08em;
      opacity:0;transform:translateY(25px)}
    .intro-letter.show{animation:letterFade 1.2s var(--easeOut) forwards}
    @keyframes letterFade{to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    
    .intro-line{width:0;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);margin-bottom:clamp(18px,3.5vh,30px)}
    .intro-line.show{animation:lineGrow 1.4s var(--easeOut) forwards}
    @keyframes lineGrow{to{width:clamp(100px,30vw,180px)}}
    
    .intro-tagline{font-size:clamp(10px,2.8vw,12px);letter-spacing:clamp(.4em,.8vw,.6em);
      color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}
    .intro-tagline.show{animation:tagFade 1s var(--easeOut) forwards}
    @keyframes tagFade{to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    
    .intro-scroll{position:absolute;bottom:clamp(35px,7vh,70px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;
      align-items:center;gap:12px;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .intro-scroll.show{animation:scrollFade 1s var(--easeOut) forwards}
    @keyframes scrollFade{to{opacity:1}}
    .intro-scroll:hover .scroll-line{height:50px}
    .intro-scroll:hover .scroll-text{opacity:1}
    
    .scroll-icon{width:24px;height:40px;border:1px solid var(--t4);border-radius:12px;
      position:relative;display:flex;justify-content:center;padding-top:8px}
    .scroll-dot{width:3px;height:8px;background:var(--t3);border-radius:3px;
      animation:scrollPulse 2s var(--ease) infinite}
    @keyframes scrollPulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:translateY(6px)}}
    
    .scroll-line{width:1px;height:30px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--t4),transparent);
      transition:height .4s var(--ease)}
    .scroll-text{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.35em;color:var(--t4);text-transform:uppercase;
      opacity:.6;transition:opacity .3s}

    /* ══ APP ══ */
    .app{min-height:100vh;min-height:100dvh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
      padding:clamp(30px,6vh,60px) clamp(16px,4vw,24px) 120px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
      transform:translateY(40px);transition:all 1s var(--easeOut);position:relative;z-index:10}
    .app.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;transform:translateY(0)}

    /* ══ HEADER ══ */
    .hd{text-align:center;margin-bottom:clamp(30px,5vh,50px);max-width:520px;width:100%}
    .hd-brand{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:clamp(10px,2.5vw,14px);
      margin-bottom:clamp(20px,4vh,40px);padding:10px 22px 10px 14px;
      background:var(--glass2);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:50px;
      backdrop-filter:blur(30px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(30px)}
    .hd-logo{width:clamp(24px,6vw,30px);height:auto}
    .hd-name{font-size:clamp(10px,2.5vw,11px);letter-spacing:.45em;font-weight:400;color:var(--t2)}
    .hd h1{font-size:clamp(30px,7.5vw,48px);font-weight:100;letter-spacing:-.01em;
      line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:clamp(14px,3vh,22px)}
    .hd p{font-size:clamp(13px,3.5vw,15px);color:var(--t3);font-weight:300;line-height:1.75}

    /* ══ PROGRESS ══ */
    .pr{width:100%;max-width:520px;margin-bottom:clamp(24px,4vh,40px)}
    .pr-bar{height:1px;background:var(--b1);overflow:visible;margin-bottom:clamp(12px,2.5vh,18px)}
    .pr-fill{height:100%;width:0%;transition:width .8s var(--easeOut);
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.5),rgba(255,255,255,.9))}
    .pr-fill::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
      width:6px;height:6px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
    .pr-txt{font-size:clamp(9px,2.2vw,10px);letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--t4);text-align:center}

    /* ══ CARD ══ */
    .card{width:100%;max-width:520px;position:relative}
    .card::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-1px;border-radius:clamp(24px,5vw,32px);
      background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--b2) 0%,transparent 30%,transparent 70%,var(--b1) 100%);
      -webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
      -webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude;padding:1px;pointer-events:none}
    .card-inner{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--glass3) 0%,var(--glass) 100%);
      backdrop-filter:blur(60px) saturate(1.2);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(60px) saturate(1.2);
      border-radius:clamp(24px,5vw,32px);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--b1)}
    .step{display:none;padding:clamp(28px,6vw,48px);animation:stepIn .6s var(--easeOut)}
    .step.on{display:block}
    @keyframes stepIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    
    .sL{font-size:clamp(8px,2vw,9px);letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--t4);
      margin-bottom:clamp(18px,4vh,28px);font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;
      display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
    .sL::before{content:'';width:20px;height:1px;background:var(--t4)}
    .sT{font-size:clamp(22px,5.5vw,30px);font-weight:200;margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.3}
    .sH{font-size:clamp(12px,3.2vw,14px);color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:clamp(24px,5vh,36px);
      line-height:1.75;font-weight:300}

    /* ══ STEP 1: PLATFORM ══ */
    .plats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(12px,3vw,16px)}
    .plat{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:clamp(18px,4vw,24px);
      padding:clamp(24px,5vw,36px) clamp(16px,4vw,24px);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
      transition:all .4s var(--easeOut);position:relative;overflow:hidden;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .plat::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;transition:opacity .4s;
      background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.06),transparent 70%)}
    .plat:active,.plat:hover{border-color:var(--b3);transform:translateY(-3px)}
    .plat:active::before,.plat:hover::before{opacity:1}
    .plat.sel{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.18);background:var(--glass2)}
    .plat.sel::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.3),transparent)}
    .plat-ico{width:clamp(48px,12vw,60px);height:clamp(48px,12vw,60px);margin:0 auto clamp(14px,3.5vw,20px);
      border-radius:clamp(14px,3vw,18px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
      background:var(--glass2);border:1px solid var(--b1);transition:all .35s;overflow:hidden}
    .plat.sel .plat-ico{border-color:var(--b2)}
    .plat-ico img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:inherit}
    .plat-n{font-size:clamp(14px,3.8vw,16px);font-weight:400;margin-bottom:5px}
    .plat-d{font-size:clamp(10px,2.6vw,11px);color:var(--t4)}
    .plat-check{position:absolute;top:clamp(12px,3vw,16px);right:clamp(12px,3vw,16px);
      width:clamp(20px,5vw,24px);height:clamp(20px,5vw,24px);border-radius:50%;background:#fff;
      display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transform:scale(0);
      transition:transform .35s var(--easeOut)}
    .plat.sel .plat-check{transform:scale(1)}
    .plat-check svg{width:12px;height:12px;stroke:#000;stroke-width:3}

    /* ══ STEP 2: CALENDAR ══ */
    .cal-hd{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:clamp(16px,3.5vh,24px)}
    .cal-mo{font-size:clamp(16px,4.5vw,20px);font-weight:300}
    .cal-nav{display:flex;gap:8px}
    .cal-btn{width:clamp(36px,9vw,44px);height:clamp(36px,9vw,44px);border-radius:clamp(12px,3vw,14px);
      border:1px solid var(--b1);background:var(--glass);color:var(--t3);cursor:pointer;
      display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .3s;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .cal-btn:active:not(:disabled),.cal-btn:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:var(--b3);color:var(--t1);background:var(--glass2)}
    .cal-btn:disabled{opacity:.12;cursor:default}
    .cal-btn svg{width:14px;height:14px;stroke-width:1.5}
    .cal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:clamp(5px,1.2vw,8px);min-height:260px;align-content:start}
    .cal-dn{font-size:clamp(9px,2.3vw,10px);letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--t4);text-align:center;
      padding:clamp(8px,2vh,12px) 0;font-weight:500}
    .cal-c{aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:clamp(12px,3vw,16px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;
      align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:clamp(13px,3.2vw,15px);font-weight:300;
      cursor:default;transition:all .25s var(--easeOut);color:var(--t4);border:1px solid transparent;
      position:relative;gap:4px;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .cal-c.av{color:var(--t2);cursor:pointer}
    .cal-c.av:active,.cal-c.av:hover{background:var(--glass2);color:var(--t1);border-color:var(--b2);transform:scale(1.08)}
    .cal-c.today{color:var(--t1);font-weight:400}
    .cal-c.today::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:clamp(5px,1.2vw,7px);width:4px;height:4px;
      border-radius:50%;background:#fff}
    .cal-c.sel{background:#fff!important;color:#000!important;font-weight:500;
      box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(255,255,255,.2);transform:scale(1.08)}
    .cal-c.sel::after{display:none}
    .cal-c.dis{opacity:.08;cursor:default}
    .cal-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.4)}
    .cal-dot.few{background:rgba(255,180,100,.5)}
    .tz{text-align:center;font-size:clamp(9px,2.3vw,10px);color:var(--t4);margin-top:clamp(12px,2.5vh,18px);letter-spacing:.1em}

    @keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:-200% 0}100%{background-position:200% 0}}
    .skel{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--bg3) 25%,var(--bg4) 50%,var(--bg3) 75%);
      background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.5s infinite;border-radius:16px}
    .skel-cell{aspect-ratio:1}

    /* ══ STEP 3: TIME ══ */
    .time-info{font-size:clamp(14px,3.6vw,16px);color:var(--t2);margin-bottom:clamp(20px,4.5vh,30px);
      padding:clamp(16px,4vw,22px);background:var(--glass);border-radius:clamp(14px,3.5vw,18px);
      text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--b1)}
    .time-info strong{color:var(--t1);font-weight:400}
    .time-info .slot-count{display:block;font-size:clamp(9px,2.3vw,10px);color:var(--t3);
      margin-top:8px;letter-spacing:.3em}
    .ts-sec{margin-bottom:clamp(16px,3.5vh,24px)}
    .ts-label{font-size:clamp(10px,2.5vw,11px);letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--t4);
      margin-bottom:clamp(10px,2.5vh,14px)}
    .ts-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:clamp(8px,2vw,12px)}
    @media(max-width:420px){.ts-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
    .ts-btn{padding:clamp(13px,3vw,16px) 6px;border-radius:clamp(12px,3vw,14px);border:1px solid var(--b1);
      background:var(--glass);color:var(--t3);font-size:clamp(13px,3.2vw,14px);font-family:var(--sans);
      cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s var(--easeOut);text-align:center;opacity:0;
      animation:slotIn .4s var(--easeOut) forwards;font-weight:300;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    @keyframes slotIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
    .ts-btn:active,.ts-btn:hover{border-color:var(--b3);color:var(--t1);background:var(--glass2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .ts-btn.sel{background:#fff;border-color:transparent;color:#000;font-weight:500;
      box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,255,255,.15);transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .ts-empty{font-size:clamp(11px,2.8vw,12px);color:var(--t4);text-align:center;padding:24px}

    /* ══ STEP 4: FORM ══ */
    .fg{margin-bottom:clamp(18px,4vh,26px)}
    .fl{display:block;font-size:clamp(9px,2.3vw,10px);font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.3em;
      color:var(--t4);margin-bottom:clamp(8px,2vh,12px);transition:color .3s;text-transform:uppercase}
    .fg:focus-within .fl{color:var(--t2)}
    .fi{width:100%;padding:clamp(15px,3.5vw,18px) clamp(16px,4vw,20px);background:var(--glass);
      border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:clamp(14px,3.5vw,16px);font-size:clamp(15px,3.8vw,16px);
      font-family:var(--sans);color:var(--t1);transition:all .35s;font-weight:300}
    .fi::placeholder{color:var(--t4)}
    .fi:focus{outline:none;border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);background:var(--bg2);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
    .fi.err-field{border-color:rgba(255,100,100,.3)}
    textarea.fi{min-height:100px;resize:vertical;line-height:1.65}
    .fi-hint{font-size:clamp(9px,2.3vw,10px);color:var(--t4);margin-top:6px;display:none}
    .fi-hint.vis{display:block;color:rgba(255,130,130,.9)}
    .fg-opt{font-size:8px;color:var(--t4);letter-spacing:.2em;margin-left:6px}

    /* ══ NAV ══ */
    .nav{display:flex;gap:clamp(12px,3vw,16px);margin-top:clamp(28px,6vh,40px);padding-top:clamp(24px,5vh,32px);
      border-top:1px solid var(--b1)}
    .btn{flex:1;padding:clamp(16px,4vw,20px) 24px;border:none;border-radius:clamp(14px,3.5vw,16px);
      font-size:clamp(10px,2.6vw,11px);font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;
      cursor:pointer;transition:all .35s var(--easeOut);font-family:var(--sans);-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .bb{background:var(--glass);color:var(--t3);border:1px solid var(--b1)}
    .bb:active,.bb:hover{border-color:var(--b3);color:var(--t1);background:var(--glass2)}
    .bn{background:#fff;color:#000;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .bn::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.5),transparent);
      transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .6s}
    .bn:hover:not(:disabled)::before{transform:translateX(100%)}
    .bn:hover:not(:disabled),.bn:active:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
    .bn:disabled{opacity:.18;cursor:default;transform:none}

    /* ══ STEP 5: SUCCESS ══ */
    .suc{text-align:center;padding:clamp(24px,5vw,36px) clamp(12px,3vw,18px)}
    .suc-ic{width:clamp(70px,18vw,90px);height:clamp(70px,18vw,90px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);
      border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto clamp(24px,5vh,36px);
      animation:sucPop .6s var(--easeOut)}
    @keyframes sucPop{from{transform:scale(0);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
    .suc-ic svg{width:clamp(28px,7vw,36px);height:clamp(28px,7vw,36px);stroke:#fff;stroke-width:1.5}
    .suc h2{font-size:clamp(24px,6.5vw,32px);font-weight:200;margin-bottom:clamp(12px,3vh,18px)}
    .suc p{font-size:clamp(13px,3.5vw,15px);color:var(--t3);line-height:1.8;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:clamp(24px,5vh,32px)}
    .suc p strong{color:var(--t1);font-weight:400}
    .suc-box{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--b1);border-radius:clamp(16px,4vw,22px);
      padding:clamp(18px,4.5vw,26px);text-align:left;margin-bottom:clamp(22px,5vh,30px)}
    .sr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:clamp(10px,2.5vh,14px) 0;
      border-bottom:1px solid var(--b1);font-size:clamp(12px,3.2vw,14px)}
    .sr:last-child{border:none}
    .sr span:first-child{color:var(--t4);font-weight:300}
    .sr span:last-child{color:var(--t1);font-weight:400}
    .suc-actions{display:flex;gap:clamp(12px,3vw,16px);justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .suc-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:clamp(14px,3.5vw,16px) clamp(22px,5.5vw,30px);
      border:1px solid var(--b2);border-radius:40px;font-size:clamp(9px,2.3vw,10px);letter-spacing:.22em;
      color:var(--t2);text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;transition:all .3s;cursor:pointer;
      background:var(--glass);font-family:var(--sans);-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .suc-link:active,.suc-link:hover{border-color:var(--b3);color:var(--t1);background:var(--glass2)}
    .suc-link svg{width:14px;height:14px}
    .suc-brand{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:clamp(22px,5vh,30px);
      font-size:clamp(9px,2.3vw,10px);letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--t4)}
    .suc-brand img{width:20px;height:auto;opacity:.5}

    /* ══ LOADING ══ */
    .ov{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.95);z-index:200;
      align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;backdrop-filter:blur(20px)}
    .ov.on{display:flex}
    .sp{width:48px;height:48px;border:1px solid var(--b1);border-top-color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);
      border-radius:50%;animation:spin .9s linear infinite}
    @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
    .ov-t{margin-top:22px;font-size:10px;color:var(--t4);letter-spacing:.45em}

    .err-msg{background:rgba(255,100,100,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,100,100,.1);color:rgba(255,150,150,.9);
      padding:clamp(14px,3.5vw,18px);border-radius:14px;margin-top:18px;font-size:clamp(12px,3.2vw,13px);
      display:none;font-weight:300;line-height:1.6}
    .err-msg.vis{display:block}

    .confetti-container{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:300;overflow:hidden}
    .confetti{position:absolute;opacity:0}
    @keyframes confettiFall{0%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(-100vh) rotate(0deg)}
      100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg)}}

    .powered{position:fixed;bottom:clamp(14px,3.5vh,24px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
      font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.35em;color:var(--t5);z-index:5}

    @media(max-width:420px){
      .nav{flex-direction:column}
      .suc-actions{flex-direction:column;width:100%}
      .suc-link{justify-content:center;width:100%}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══ AMBIENT BACKGROUND ═══ -->
<div class="ambient">
  <div class="ambient-gradient" id="ambientGradient"></div>
  <canvas id="ambientCanvas"></canvas>
</div>
<div class="vignette"></div>

<!-- ═══ INTRO ═══ -->
<div class="intro" id="intro">
  <div class="intro-content" id="introContent">
    <img class="intro-logo" id="introLogo" src="https://i.ibb.co/8DVc28FY/logo.png" alt="NOVA">
    <div class="intro-text">
      <span class="intro-letter" id="L0">N</span>
      <span class="intro-letter" id="L1">O</span>
      <span class="intro-letter" id="L2">V</span>
      <span class="intro-letter" id="L3">A</span>
    </div>
    <div class="intro-line" id="introLine"></div>
    <div class="intro-tagline" id="introTag">Infraestructura Inteligente</div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="intro-scroll" id="introScroll" onclick="exitIntro()">
    <div class="scroll-icon"><div class="scroll-dot"></div></div>
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
    <span class="scroll-text">Desliza</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ LOADING ═══ -->
<div class="ov" id="ov">
  <div class="sp"></div>
  <p class="ov-t">Procesando</p>
</div>

<!-- ═══ CONFETTI ═══ -->
<div class="confetti-container" id="confettiBox"></div>

<!-- ═══ APP ═══ -->
<div class="app" id="app">
  <div class="hd">
    <div class="hd-brand">
      <img class="hd-logo" src="https://i.ibb.co/8DVc28FY/logo.png" alt="NOVA">
      <span class="hd-name">NOVA</span>
    </div>
    <h1>Agenda tu sesión estratégica</h1>
    <p>Elige plataforma, fecha y horario disponible.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="pr">
    <div class="pr-bar"><div class="pr-fill" id="pFill"></div></div>
    <p class="pr-txt" id="pTxt">Paso 1 de 4</p>
  </div>

  <div class="card"><div class="card-inner">

    <!-- STEP 1 -->
    <div class="step on" data-s="1">
      <div class="sL">Paso 01</div>
      <h2 class="sT">¿Dónde conectamos?</h2>
      <p class="sH">Elige tu plataforma preferida para la videollamada.</p>
      <div class="plats">
        <div class="plat" onclick="pickPlat('zoom',this)">
          <div class="plat-check"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M5 13l4 4L19 7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="plat-ico">
            <img src="https://i.ibb.co/bj1z04Bf/zoom.png" alt="Zoom" onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='<svg viewBox=\'0 0 24 24\' fill=\'none\' stroke=\'rgba(255,255,255,.4)\' stroke-width=\'1.5\'><rect x=\'2\' y=\'5\' width=\'13\' height=\'14\' rx=\'3\'/><path d=\'M15 10l5-3v10l-5-3\'/></svg>'">
          </div>
          <div class="plat-n">Zoom</div>
          <div class="plat-d">Videollamada HD</div>
        </div>
        <div class="plat" onclick="pickPlat('meet',this)">
          <div class="plat-check"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M5 13l4 4L19 7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
          <div class="plat-ico">
            <img src="https://i.ibb.co/xt1wWPhv/meet.png" alt="Meet" onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='<svg viewBox=\'0 0 24 24\' fill=\'none\' stroke=\'rgba(255,255,255,.4)\' stroke-width=\'1.5\'><rect x=\'2\' y=\'5\' width=\'13\' height=\'14\' rx=\'3\'/><path d=\'M15 10l5-3v10l-5-3\'/></svg>'">
          </div>
          <div class="plat-n">Google Meet</div>
          <div class="plat-d">Sin instalación</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="nav"><button class="btn bn" id="b1" disabled onclick="goStep(2)">Continuar</button></div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 2 -->
    <div class="step" data-s="2">
      <div class="sL">Paso 02</div>
      <h2 class="sT">Elige una fecha</h2>
      <p class="sH">Solo días con disponibilidad confirmada.</p>
      <div class="cal-hd">
        <span class="cal-mo" id="calMo"></span>
        <div class="cal-nav">
          <button class="cal-btn" id="calP" onclick="calNav(-1)"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><path d="M15 18l-6-6 6-6"/></svg></button>
          <button class="cal-btn" id="calN" onclick="calNav(1)"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><path d="M9 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg></button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cal-grid" id="calG"></div>
      <div class="tz" id="tzEl"></div>
      <div class="nav">
        <button class="btn bb" onclick="goStep(1)">Atrás</button>
        <button class="btn bn" id="b2" disabled onclick="goStep(3)">Continuar</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 3 -->
    <div class="step" data-s="3">
      <div class="sL">Paso 03</div>
      <h2 class="sT">Selecciona horario</h2>
      <div class="time-info" id="tInfo"></div>
      <div class="ts-sec"><div class="ts-label">Mañana</div><div class="ts-grid" id="tAM"></div></div>
      <div class="ts-sec"><div class="ts-label">Tarde</div><div class="ts-grid" id="tPM"></div></div>
      <div class="nav">
        <button class="btn bb" onclick="goStep(2)">Atrás</button>
        <button class="btn bn" id="b3" disabled onclick="goStep(4)">Continuar</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 4 -->
    <div class="step" data-s="4">
      <div class="sL">Último paso</div>
      <h2 class="sT">Tus datos</h2>
      <p class="sH">Para preparar una sesión personalizada.</p>
      <div class="fg">
        <label class="fl">Nombre completo</label>
        <input class="fi" id="fName" placeholder="Tu nombre" autocomplete="name">
        <div class="fi-hint" id="hName"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fg">
        <label class="fl">Email</label>
        <input class="fi" type="email" id="fEmail" placeholder="tu@email.com" autocomplete="email">
        <div class="fi-hint" id="hEmail"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fg">
        <label class="fl">Teléfono <span class="fg-opt">(Opcional)</span></label>
        <input class="fi" type="tel" id="fPhone" placeholder="+52 55 1234 5678" autocomplete="tel">
      </div>
      <div class="fg">
        <label class="fl">Tu negocio</label>
        <input class="fi" id="fBiz" placeholder="Agencia, SaaS, consultoría...">
        <div class="fi-hint" id="hBiz"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="fg">
        <label class="fl">¿Qué necesitas resolver?</label>
        <textarea class="fi" id="fNeed" placeholder="Describe tu reto principal"></textarea>
        <div class="fi-hint" id="hNeed"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="nav">
        <button class="btn bb" onclick="goStep(3)">Atrás</button>
        <button class="btn bn" id="bSub" onclick="doSubmit()">Confirmar</button>
      </div>
      <div class="err-msg" id="errMsg"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 5 -->
    <div class="step" data-s="5">
      <div class="suc">
        <div class="suc-ic"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></div>
        <h2>Sesión Confirmada</h2>
        <p>Recibirás un email con los detalles.<br><strong>Revisa tu bandeja de entrada.</strong></p>
        <div class="suc-box" id="sucBox"></div>
        <div class="suc-actions">
          <a class="suc-link" id="gcalLink" href="#" target="_blank">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M16 2v4M8 2v4M3 10h18"/></svg>
            Google Calendar
          </a>
          <button class="suc-link" onclick="copyDetails()">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 01-2-2V4a2 2 0 012-2h9a2 2 0 012 2v1"/></svg>
            Copiar detalles
          </button>
        </div>
        <span class="suc-brand"><img src="https://i.ibb.co/8DVc28FY/logo.png" alt="">NOVA</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div></div>
</div>

<div class="powered">NOVA</div>

<script>
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  AMBIENT BACKGROUND - SUBTLE PARTICLES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const canvas = document.getElementById('ambientCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let particles = [];
let mouseX = -1000, mouseY = -1000;
let animationId;

function initCanvas() {
  canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  particles = [];
  
  const count = Math.min(40, Math.floor((canvas.width * canvas.height) / 30000));
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    particles.push({
      x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
      y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
      vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.2,
      vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.2,
      size: Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5,
      alpha: Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.1
    });
  }
}

function drawAmbient() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  
  // Draw connections
  for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++) {
    for (let j = i + 1; j < particles.length; j++) {
      const dx = particles[i].x - particles[j].x;
      const dy = particles[i].y - particles[j].y;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      
      if (dist < 120) {
        const alpha = (1 - dist / 120) * 0.06;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(particles[i].x, particles[i].y);
        ctx.lineTo(particles[j].x, particles[j].y);
        ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${alpha})`;
        ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
        ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Update and draw particles
  particles.forEach(p => {
    // Mouse repulsion
    const dx = p.x - mouseX;
    const dy = p.y - mouseY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    if (dist < 150 && dist > 0) {
      const force = (1 - dist / 150) * 0.015;
      p.x += dx * force;
      p.y += dy * force;
    }
    
    p.x += p.vx;
    p.y += p.vy;
    
    if (p.x < 0) p.x = canvas.width;
    if (p.x > canvas.width) p.x = 0;
    if (p.y < 0) p.y = canvas.height;
    if (p.y > canvas.height) p.y = 0;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${p.alpha})`;
    ctx.fill();
  });
  
  animationId = requestAnimationFrame(drawAmbient);
}

initCanvas();
drawAmbient();

window.addEventListener('resize', initCanvas);
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mouseX = e.clientX; mouseY = e.clientY; });
document.addEventListener('touchmove', e => { mouseX = e.touches[0].clientX; mouseY = e.touches[0].clientY; }, { passive: true });

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  INTRO ANIMATION SEQUENCE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let introExited = false;

function runIntroSequence() {
  const content = document.getElementById('introContent');
  const logo = document.getElementById('introLogo');
  const letters = [document.getElementById('L0'), document.getElementById('L1'), document.getElementById('L2'), document.getElementById('L3')];
  const line = document.getElementById('introLine');
  const tag = document.getElementById('introTag');
  const scroll = document.getElementById('introScroll');
  
  // Sequence timing
  setTimeout(() => content.classList.add('show'), 300);
  setTimeout(() => logo.classList.add('show'), 600);
  
  letters.forEach((l, i) => {
    setTimeout(() => l.classList.add('show'), 1400 + i * 150);
  });
  
  setTimeout(() => line.classList.add('show'), 2200);
  setTimeout(() => tag.classList.add('show'), 2600);
  setTimeout(() => scroll.classList.add('show'), 3200);
}

function exitIntro() {
  if (introExited) return;
  introExited = true;
  
  const intro = document.getElementById('intro');
  const gradient = document.getElementById('ambientGradient');
  
  intro.classList.add('exit');
  gradient.classList.add('on');
  
  setTimeout(() => {
    intro.classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('app').classList.add('on');
    startApp();
  }, 1200);
  
  ls.set('nova_final', '1');
}

// Touch/Wheel to exit
let touchStartY = 0;
document.getElementById('intro').addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;
}, { passive: true });

document.getElementById('intro').addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
  const diff = touchStartY - e.touches[0].clientY;
  if (diff > 50) exitIntro();
}, { passive: true });

document.getElementById('intro').addEventListener('wheel', e => {
  if (e.deltaY > 30) exitIntro();
}, { passive: true });

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  STORAGE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const _mem = {};
let _sOk = false, _lOk = false;
try { sessionStorage.setItem('_t', '1'); sessionStorage.removeItem('_t'); _sOk = true; } catch(e) {}
try { localStorage.setItem('_t', '1'); localStorage.removeItem('_t'); _lOk = true; } catch(e) {}

const store = {
  get: k => { try { return _sOk ? sessionStorage.getItem(k) : _mem[k] || null; } catch(e) { return _mem[k] || null; } },
  set: (k, v) => { try { if (_sOk) sessionStorage.setItem(k, v); } catch(e) {} _mem[k] = v; },
  del: k => { try { if (_sOk) sessionStorage.removeItem(k); } catch(e) {} delete _mem[k]; }
};

const ls = {
  get: k => { try { return _lOk ? localStorage.getItem(k) : _mem['ls_' + k] || null; } catch(e) { return _mem['ls_' + k] || null; } },
  set: (k, v) => { try { if (_lOk) localStorage.setItem(k, v); } catch(e) {} _mem['ls_' + k] = v; }
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  CONFIG
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const _p = window.location.pathname;
const _base = _p.substring(0, _p.lastIndexOf('/'));

const CFG = {
  api: window.location.origin + _base,
  endpoints: { availability: '/agendar-mes', book: '/agendar-receiver' },
  fallbackSlots: {
    am: ['09:00', '09:30', '10:00', '10:30', '11:00', '11:30', '12:00', '12:30'],
    pm: ['13:00', '13:30', '14:00', '14:30', '15:00', '15:30', '16:00', '16:30', '17:00', '17:30']
  },
  maxMonthsAhead: 2, slotDuration: 30, submitTimeoutMs: 20000
};

const MONTHS = ['Enero', 'Febrero', 'Marzo', 'Abril', 'Mayo', 'Junio', 'Julio', 'Agosto', 'Septiembre', 'Octubre', 'Noviembre', 'Diciembre'];
const DAYS = ['Lun', 'Mar', 'Mié', 'Jue', 'Vie', 'Sáb', 'Dom'];
const TODAY = new Date(); TODAY.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
const USER_TZ = Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone;

const S = {
  platform: null, date: null, dateStr: null, time: null, slots: [],
  cMonth: TODAY.getMonth(), cYear: TODAY.getFullYear(),
  monthCache: {}, step: 1, submitted: false
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  INIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function init() {
  if (ls.get('nova_final')) {
    // Skip intro
    document.getElementById('intro').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('ambientGradient').classList.add('on');
    document.getElementById('app').classList.add('on');
    startApp();
  } else {
    runIntroSequence();
  }
}

function startApp() {
  document.getElementById('tzEl').textContent = USER_TZ;
  loadSession();
  fetchMonth(S.cYear, S.cMonth);
}

init();

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  SESSION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function saveSession() {
  store.set('nova_s', JSON.stringify({ platform: S.platform, dateStr: S.dateStr, time: S.time, step: S.step }));
}

function loadSession() {
  try {
    const raw = store.get('nova_s');
    if (!raw) return;
    const d = JSON.parse(raw);
    if (!d || d.step >= 5) return;
    
    if (d.platform) {
      S.platform = d.platform;
      document.getElementById('b1').disabled = false;
      document.querySelectorAll('.plat').forEach((el, i) => {
        if ((i === 0 && d.platform === 'zoom') || (i === 1 && d.platform === 'meet')) el.classList.add('sel');
      });
    }
    if (d.dateStr) {
      S.dateStr = d.dateStr;
      S.date = new Date(d.dateStr + 'T12:00:00');
      S.cMonth = S.date.getMonth();
      S.cYear = S.date.getFullYear();
      document.getElementById('b2').disabled = false;
    }
    if (d.time) S.time = d.time;
    if (d.step > 1) goStep(d.step, true);
  } catch(e) {}
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  API
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function fetchMonth(year, month) {
  const key = year + '-' + month;
  if (S.monthCache[key]) { renderCalendar(S.monthCache[key]); return; }
  
  renderCalendarSkeleton();
  
  try {
    const url = CFG.api + CFG.endpoints.availability + '?year=' + year + '&month=' + (month + 1) + '&tz=' + encodeURIComponent(USER_TZ);
    const res = await fetch(url);
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    const data = await res.json();
    S.monthCache[key] = data.availability || {};
  } catch(e) {
    S.monthCache[key] = generateFallback(year, month);
  }
  
  renderCalendar(S.monthCache[key]);
}

function generateFallback(year, month) {
  const result = {};
  const dim = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
  for (let d = 1; d <= dim; d++) {
    const dt = new Date(year, month, d);
    if (dt < TODAY || dt.getDay() === 0) continue;
    result[fmtDate(year, month + 1, d)] = [...CFG.fallbackSlots.am, ...CFG.fallbackSlots.pm];
  }
  return result;
}

function fmtDate(y, m, d) {
  return y + '-' + String(m).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(d).padStart(2, '0');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NAVIGATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function goStep(n, silent) {
  document.querySelector('.step.on').classList.remove('on');
  document.querySelector('[data-s="' + n + '"]').classList.add('on');
  
  const pct = n >= 5 ? 100 : (n / 4) * 100;
  document.getElementById('pFill').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('pTxt').textContent = n >= 5 ? 'Completado' : 'Paso ' + n + ' de 4';
  
  S.step = n;
  if (n === 3) renderTimeSlots();
  if (n === 5) launchConfetti();
  if (!silent) { saveSession(); window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  PLATFORM
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function pickPlat(p, el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.plat').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('sel'));
  el.classList.add('sel');
  S.platform = p;
  document.getElementById('b1').disabled = false;
  saveSession();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  CALENDAR
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderCalendarSkeleton() {
  const g = document.getElementById('calG');
  document.getElementById('calMo').textContent = MONTHS[S.cMonth] + ' ' + S.cYear;
  updateCalNav();
  g.innerHTML = '';
  
  DAYS.forEach(d => {
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'cal-dn';
    el.textContent = d;
    g.appendChild(el);
  });
  
  for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'skel skel-cell';
    g.appendChild(el);
  }
}

function renderCalendar(avail) {
  const year = S.cYear, month = S.cMonth;
  const g = document.getElementById('calG');
  
  document.getElementById('calMo').textContent = MONTHS[month] + ' ' + year;
  updateCalNav();
  g.innerHTML = '';
  
  DAYS.forEach(d => {
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'cal-dn';
    el.textContent = d;
    g.appendChild(el);
  });
  
  let sd = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay() - 1;
  if (sd < 0) sd = 6;
  
  for (let i = 0; i < sd; i++) {
    g.appendChild(document.createElement('div')).className = 'cal-c';
  }
  
  const dim = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
  
  for (let d = 1; d <= dim; d++) {
    const dt = new Date(year, month, d);
    dt.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const ds = fmtDate(year, month + 1, d);
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'cal-c';
    
    const isPast = dt < TODAY;
    const isSunday = dt.getDay() === 0;
    const slots = avail[ds] || [];
    const hasSlots = slots.length > 0;
    const isToday = dt.getTime() === TODAY.getTime();
    const isSel = S.dateStr === ds;
    
    const num = document.createElement('span');
    num.textContent = d;
    el.appendChild(num);
    
    if (isToday) el.classList.add('today');
    if (isSel) el.classList.add('sel');
    
    if (!isPast && !isSunday && hasSlots) {
      el.classList.add('av');
      const dot = document.createElement('span');
      dot.className = 'cal-dot';
      if (slots.length <= 3) dot.classList.add('few');
      el.appendChild(dot);
      
      ((dt2, ds2, slots2) => {
        el.onclick = () => {
          S.date = dt2;
          S.dateStr = ds2;
          S.slots = slots2;
          S.time = null;
          document.getElementById('b2').disabled = false;
          document.getElementById('b3').disabled = true;
          renderCalendar(avail);
          saveSession();
        };
      })(dt, ds, slots);
    } else {
      el.classList.add('dis');
    }
    
    g.appendChild(el);
  }
}

function updateCalNav() {
  const now = new Date();
  document.getElementById('calP').disabled = (S.cYear === now.getFullYear() && S.cMonth <= now.getMonth());
  const mx = new Date(now);
  mx.setMonth(mx.getMonth() + CFG.maxMonthsAhead);
  document.getElementById('calN').disabled = (S.cYear > mx.getFullYear() || (S.cYear === mx.getFullYear() && S.cMonth >= mx.getMonth()));
}

function calNav(dir) {
  S.cMonth += dir;
  if (S.cMonth > 11) { S.cMonth = 0; S.cYear++; }
  if (S.cMonth < 0) { S.cMonth = 11; S.cYear--; }
  fetchMonth(S.cYear, S.cMonth);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  TIME SLOTS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderTimeSlots() {
  if (!S.date || !S.slots) return;
  S.time = null;
  document.getElementById('b3').disabled = true;
  
  const opts = { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long' };
  const fmt = S.date.toLocaleDateString('es-ES', opts);
  
  document.getElementById('tInfo').innerHTML =
    '<strong>' + fmt.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + fmt.slice(1) + '</strong>' +
    '<span class="slot-count">' + S.slots.length + ' disponibles</span>';
  
  renderSlotGroup('tAM', S.slots.filter(t => parseInt(t) < 13));
  renderSlotGroup('tPM', S.slots.filter(t => parseInt(t) >= 13));
}

function renderSlotGroup(id, slots) {
  const container = document.getElementById(id);
  const label = container.previousElementSibling;
  
  if (slots.length === 0) {
    container.innerHTML = '<div class="ts-empty">Sin horarios</div>';
    label.style.opacity = '.3';
    return;
  }
  
  label.style.opacity = '1';
  container.innerHTML = '';
  
  slots.forEach((t, i) => {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'ts-btn';
    btn.textContent = t;
    btn.type = 'button';
    btn.style.animationDelay = (i * 40) + 'ms';
    
    btn.onclick = () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.ts-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('sel'));
      btn.classList.add('sel');
      S.time = t;
      document.getElementById('b3').disabled = false;
      saveSession();
    };
    
    container.appendChild(btn);
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  VALIDATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function validateForm() {
  let ok = true;
  const fields = [
    { id: 'fName', hint: 'hName', msg: 'Ingresa tu nombre', test: v => v.length >= 2 },
    { id: 'fEmail', hint: 'hEmail', msg: 'Email inválido', test: v => /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(v) },
    { id: 'fBiz', hint: 'hBiz', msg: 'Describe tu negocio', test: v => v.length >= 2 },
    { id: 'fNeed', hint: 'hNeed', msg: 'Describe qué necesitas', test: v => v.length >= 5 }
  ];
  
  fields.forEach(f => {
    const el = document.getElementById(f.id);
    const hint = document.getElementById(f.hint);
    const val = el.value.trim();
    
    if (!f.test(val)) {
      el.classList.add('err-field');
      hint.textContent = f.msg;
      hint.classList.add('vis');
      ok = false;
    } else {
      el.classList.remove('err-field');
      hint.classList.remove('vis');
    }
  });
  
  return ok;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  SUBMIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let lastSubmit = 0;

function showSuccess(dateFmt, email, phone) {
  if (S.submitted) return;
  S.submitted = true;
  store.del('nova_s');
  
  document.getElementById('ov').classList.remove('on');
  document.getElementById('sucBox').innerHTML =
    '<div class="sr"><span>Plataforma</span><span>' + (S.platform === 'zoom' ? 'Zoom' : 'Google Meet') + '</span></div>' +
    '<div class="sr"><span>Fecha</span><span>' + dateFmt + '</span></div>' +
    '<div class="sr"><span>Hora</span><span>' + S.time + '</span></div>' +
    '<div class="sr"><span>Email</span><span>' + email + '</span></div>' +
    (phone ? '<div class="sr"><span>Teléfono</span><span>' + phone + '</span></div>' : '');
  
  document.getElementById('gcalLink').href = buildCalLink();
  goStep(5);
}

async function doSubmit() {
  if (S.submitted) return;
  if (Date.now() - lastSubmit < 3000) return;
  if (!validateForm()) return;
  
  lastSubmit = Date.now();
  document.getElementById('errMsg').classList.remove('vis');
  
  const btn = document.getElementById('bSub');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.textContent = 'PROCESANDO...';
  document.getElementById('ov').classList.add('on');
  
  const name = document.getElementById('fName').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('fEmail').value.trim();
  const phone = document.getElementById('fPhone').value.trim();
  const biz = document.getElementById('fBiz').value.trim();
  const need = document.getElementById('fNeed').value.trim();
  
  const dateFmt = S.date.toLocaleDateString('es-ES', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
  
  const payload = {
    leadId: 'nova-' + Date.now(),
    source: 'landing-nova-final',
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    platform: S.platform,
    date: S.date.toISOString(),
    dateFormatted: dateFmt,
    time: S.time,
    timezone: USER_TZ,
    fullName: name,
    email: email,
    phone: phone || null,
    business: biz,
    need: need
  };
  
  const url = CFG.api + CFG.endpoints.book;
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), CFG.submitTimeoutMs);
  
  let fetchOk = false, fetchError = null;
  
  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      signal: controller.signal
    });
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    fetchOk = res.ok;
    if (!res.ok) {
      let errData = {};
      try { errData = await res.json(); } catch(e) {}
      fetchError = errData.message || 'Error ' + res.status;
    }
  } catch(e) {
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    if (e.name === 'AbortError') fetchOk = true;
    else fetchError = 'Sin conexión.';
  }
  
  if (fetchOk) {
    showSuccess(dateFmt, email, phone);
  } else {
    document.getElementById('ov').classList.remove('on');
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.textContent = 'Confirmar';
    const errEl = document.getElementById('errMsg');
    errEl.textContent = fetchError;
    errEl.classList.add('vis');
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  UTILS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function buildCalLink() {
  const parts = S.time.split(':');
  const h = parseInt(parts[0]), m = parseInt(parts[1]);
  const start = new Date(S.date);
  start.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  const end = new Date(start);
  end.setMinutes(end.getMinutes() + CFG.slotDuration);
  
  const f = d => d.toISOString().replace(/[-:]/g, '').replace(/\.\d{3}/, '');
  const plat = S.platform === 'zoom' ? 'Zoom' : 'Google Meet';
  
  return 'https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE' +
    '&text=' + encodeURIComponent('Sesión Estratégica · NOVA') +
    '&dates=' + f(start) + '/' + f(end) +
    '&details=' + encodeURIComponent('Sesión vía ' + plat + ' · NOVA') +
    '&location=' + encodeURIComponent(plat);
}

function copyDetails() {
  const plat = S.platform === 'zoom' ? 'Zoom' : 'Google Meet';
  const dateFmt = S.date.toLocaleDateString('es-ES', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
  const txt = 'Sesión Estratégica · NOVA\n' + plat + '\n' + dateFmt + '\n' + S.time + ' (' + USER_TZ + ')';
  
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(() => {
    const b = event.target.closest('.suc-link');
    const orig = b.innerHTML;
    b.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg> Copiado';
    setTimeout(() => b.innerHTML = orig, 2000);
  }).catch(() => {});
}

function launchConfetti() {
  const box = document.getElementById('confettiBox');
  for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'confetti';
    el.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
    el.style.width = el.style.height = (Math.random() * 5 + 3) + 'px';
    el.style.background = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.4})`;
    el.style.borderRadius = Math.random() > 0.5 ? '50%' : '1px';
    el.style.animation = `confettiFall ${Math.random() * 2 + 1.5}s ease-out ${Math.random() * 0.5}s forwards`;
    box.appendChild(el);
  }
  setTimeout(() => box.innerHTML = '', 4000);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
